name: Zendesk
description: Monitor Zendesk agents and group configuration for customer support compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to Zendesk Admin > Apps and Integrations > Zendesk API
2. Enable Token Access and create an API token
3. Encode your credentials: base64('your_email/token:your_api_token')
4. Enter the encoded value below along with your subdomain

credentialFields.label: Encoded API Credentials
credentialFields.helpText: Base64 encode your credentials: {email}/token:{api_token}. Use https://www.base64encode.org/ — encode 'user@example.com/token:your_api_token'

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Zendesk agents and verifies appropriate access levels

checks.name: Contact Information
checks.description: Verifies Zendesk groups are configured for support organization
